text:
From: Alice Reynolds <alice.reynolds@pivotalcare.com>
To: Ben Carter <ben.carter@redwood.com>
Cc: Naomi Feldman <naomi.feldman@redwood.com>
Date: Thu, 11 Mar 2027 08:12:00 -0700
Subject: Increased P95/P99 latency over last 3 hours — production

Hi Ben,

We're seeing a sudden increase in tail latency from your Hosted API for our production tenant. P95 has climbed from ~220ms to ~1.2s and P99 is now consistently 2.5-3s for text.generate calls. This started about 3 hours ago and coincides with a higher error spike (5xx ~0.6%). Throughput is otherwise steady.

We rely on the 99th percentile for user-facing features and need this mitigated quickly. I've attached a short sample of traces and the aggregated P95/P99 export. Can your team confirm whether this is related to batching or request queueing?

Thanks,
Alice Reynolds
Head of Platform Operations
PivotalCare

- Do you have an estimate on time-to-recovery / mitigation steps?
- Any customer-facing mitigations we should apply on our side?

Rajiv Menon

Date: Tue, 08 Sep 2026 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Marketplace deal economics — rebate carveout & channel passback evidence

Hi Marta,

Thanks again for the time today. Per our discussion I wanted to capture the open questions we need to close before we finalize the private-offer economics for Acadia Health (ACD-2026-4721):

1) Rebate slab definition — you mentioned a 12–24 month commit with tiered volume rebates. Can you confirm which usage buckets you expect to count toward the tier (monthly consumption vs committed reserved hours)?

2) Channel passback — your procurement team needs a clear invoice-level passback path to the reseller (they called this "distributor visibility"). We typically provide a monthly reconci...

text:
From: Priyom Das <priyom.das@redwood.ai>
To: Phil Barnes <phil.barnes@searchlytics.com>
Cc: Laura Bennett <laura.bennett@redwood.ai>, Ethan Park <ethan.park@redwood.ai>
Date: Tue, 7 Sep 2026 09:14:00 -0700
Subject: Unified rerank POC — technical checklist & next steps

Hi Phil / Maya —

Thanks again for the call this morning. Quick recap from my side plus the technical checklist Laura / Ethan will need to scope the POC: 

Summary of needs (from SearchLytics):
- Reranking layer after first-pass retrieval for product search (latency SLO: 120ms p95 at 50 qps)
- Support for dense embeddings as features + sparse term signals
- Ability to evaluate multiple ranking signals and tune top_k and reranker depth
- Auditability: per-request scoring and trace for model selection and routing

Technical checklist for the POC (items we can deliver / need from you):
1) SDK & auth: Redwood SDK installed,...

- Canonical list of outbound IPs (or IP ranges) required for the control plane and model endpoints.
- Whether DNS or SNI allowlisting is required in addition to IPs.
- Any egress proxy / mTLS expectations for the control plane.

text:
From: Marta Lewis <marta.lewis@healco.com>
To: Ethan Park <ethan_park@redwood.com>
Cc: Procurement Team <procurement@healco.com>
Date: 2026-08-29T09:12:00Z
Subject: DPA questions: model improvement & prompt/response ownership

Hi Ethan —

Thanks for the quick demo last week. Our legal/procurement teams are reviewing the DPA and have a few gating asks before we can move to signature:

• Can Redwood commit to a model-improvement opt-out (no adaptive training) for our tenant data? We need language that is operationally enforceable, not just aspirational.
• We also need clarity on ownership of prompts and generated responses — HealCo must retain exclusive rights to prompts and responses created from our users.
• Please provide a current subprocessor inventory and a short description of where interaction logs may be routed (S3, GCP buckets, onshore/offshore).
• Any evidence you can share a...

Subject: Quick Hosted API eval — 30min walkthrough request

Hi Ethan,

I signed up for the Hosted API trial today and would love a very focused 30-minute walkthrough next week to validate performance on our small inference workload. We mainly need to:
- Confirm token/latency expectations for short prompts (<=256 tokens)
- See an embeddings sample and cost estimate for our monthly volume (~5M tokens)
- Quick look at sandbox provisioning and auth

We are Pacific time (PST). Available windows: Wed 8/19 afternoon (PST) or Thu 8/20 morning. If you have a short preflight checklist I can fill before the session.

Thanks,
Sukanya Rao
Head of ML & Data — Lumen Labs

text:
From: Miriam Vos <miriam@edgeware.ai>
To: Ethan Park <ethan@redwood.com>
Date: Sat, 15 Aug 2026 09:12:00 -0700
Subject: Request: Redwood HQ technical walkthrough — Edgeware AI

Hi Ethan,

I lead infra at Edgeware; we'd like to book an on-site technical walkthrough at Redwood HQ for our engineering leadership and platform team. Goal: 90-minute session to review integration patterns, latency/cost tradeoffs, and a short demo of a sample workload.

Proposed windows: Aug 25 (anytime between 10:00–15:00) or Aug 26 (morning). Our group is ~6 people (2 presenters, 4 observers).

A few logistics/questions up front:
- Can you confirm NDA/visitor agreement process (we prefer DocuSign before arrival)?
- Do presenters need special network access or can they use guest Wi‑Fi?
- Any AV constraints (we bring two laptops, one macbook, one linux)?
- Parking and building access details for external visit...
